name: Sofia Almeida
summary: Mid-level Backend Engineer with 5 years of experience in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable Java-based applications. Proven ability to contribute to all phases of the software development lifecycle, from conception to deployment. Seeking to leverage expertise in microservices and cloud technologies to drive innovation.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained microservices using Java and Spring Boot, focusing on RESTful API design and implementation. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features. Implemented unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and reliability. Participated in code reviews and mentored junior developers.

experience.title: Junior Backend Developer
experience.description: Assisted in the development of backend systems using Java and related technologies. Contributed to database design and optimization. Wrote and maintained technical documentation. Gained experience with Agile methodologies and CI/CD pipelines.

experience.title: Intern Software Developer
experience.description: Supported the backend development team with bug fixing and feature implementation. Learned foundational concepts of Java development and version control systems. Assisted with testing and deployment processes.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
